requirements.task_name: Get a 5kW residential quote with monthly payment under $120 and save it
requirements.task_description: Use the quote tool for ZIP 94110, 5kW residential, then save a quote with monthly payment < $120.

requirements.task_name: Select a 6–8 kW residential package under $15,000 with at least 20-year warranty
requirements.task_description: Compare first two residential packages in the 6–8 kW range and add the qualifying, cheaper one to quote.

requirements.task_name: Book the earliest weekday 10:00 AM virtual consultation for ZIP 78704
requirements.task_description: Schedule a virtual consultation for ZIP 78704 at the earliest available weekday 10:00 AM slot and submit.

requirements.task_name: Save the most recent federal solar tax credit article from the last 12 months
requirements.task_description: Search tax credit articles, filter to last 12 months, sort newest, then save the most recent relevant article with tag.

requirements.task_name: Create a savings scenario with at least $1,500 estimated annual savings and save it
requirements.task_description: Use savings calculator for ZIP 85001, bill $200, adjust system size until annual savings ≥ $1,500, save as named scenario.

requirements.task_name: Contact a top-rated installer within 25 miles of ZIP 30301 with 4.5+ stars and 50+ reviews
requirements.task_description: Find an installer near 30301 (≤25 miles, ≥4.5 stars, ≥50 reviews), open profile, and send a specific contact message.

requirements.task_name: Design a residential system with 16×400W panels and at least 10 kWh battery storage
requirements.task_description: Use the system builder to create the specified configuration and proceed to the system summary page.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully loading a design (design != null) where: design.system_type === 'residential', design.roof_type === 'asphalt_shingle', design.roof_pitch === 'medium_25_35' (or equivalent medium pitch value used), design.panel_quantity === 16, the associated panel model has wattage === 400, design.include_battery === true, and design.battery_capacity_kwh >= 10; i.e., the summary corresponds to a design that satisfies the task’s configuration requirements.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user actually opened the system summary page for a design that meets the residential / 16×400W panels / ≥10 kWh battery / string inverter criteria, which cannot be inferred from system_designs alone because viewing the summary has no existing persisted side effect.

requirements.task_name: Choose a financing option with under $3,000 upfront and under $150/month and save a pre-application
requirements.task_description: Compare financing options for an $18,000 project (ZIP 60601, credit 680–719), filter by cost caps, choose the lowest-APR option, and save a draft application.
